features: TRIPLE COATED BLADES - Optimized with a triple coating, blades will provide a comfortable and close shave.
PREMIUM METAL HANDLE - Experience an authentic shave while using the blades with the classic and premium design of the metal Double Edge handle.
MADE IN GERMANY - The Double Edge Blades are made in Germany.
BLADE REFILLS - The Double Edge Blades are compatible with the Double Edge Razor and the Straight Edge Razor.
BLADE MASTERS SINCE 1772 - We've been crafting quality blades since 1772, with Wilkinson Sword in your hand you can have a masterful shave every time.
PACKAGING - Our packaging is made with more than 90% recycled paper (mix of PCR & PIR). Packaging recyclable, check your local recycling facilities.
description: Experience a masterfully comfortable shave with the Double Edge Blades from Wilkinson Sword. Fine blades crafted by Wilkinson Sword, the Double Edge Blades will provide you with an incredibly close shave whenever you need it. Designed to ensure a pleasant glide on your skin, these blades are triple coated for a clean shave. You can enjoy an authentic shave with the classic and premium design of this metal handle. The Double Edge Blades are made in Germany. Experience a masterfully close and comfortable shave with The Double Edge Razor, only from Wilkinson Sword, Blade Masters since 1772.
